notes.title: Organization and nature of operations
notes.content: LLC registered in Delaware on 2017-04-13. Sole member: Mondofix USA LLC, owned by Mondofix Inc. (Canadian ultimate parent). Franchisor of Novus Glass in USA under license from ultimate parent.

sub_policies.basis: US GAAP, presented in USD (functional currency)
sub_policies.use_of_estimates: Estimates for allowance for expected credit losses and deferred income tax asset
sub_policies.financial_instruments: Measured at fair value on initial recognition, subsequently at amortized cost. All Level 1 hierarchy.

revenue_recognition.royalties: Recognized monthly based on franchisee gross sales (greater of % or minimum)
revenue_recognition.vendor_allowances: Recognized based on periodic purchases and contractual terms
revenue_recognition.franchisee_contributions: Recognized when earned and services rendered; initial fees deferred over license term
revenue_recognition.product_sales: Recognized upon delivery when substantially performed

sub_policies.advertising_fund: Contributions from franchisees must be spent on advertising/marketing; excess recorded as deferred revenue. 2024 advertising costs: $1,114,487 (2023: $629,115)
sub_policies.rights: $300,000 exclusive US area developer rights; indefinite life, not amortized
sub_policies.leases: ASC 842; operating leases with ROU assets and liabilities. Risk-free rates used. Short-term leases (<12 months) not recognized. No renewal options included unless reasonably certain to exercise.
sub_policies.income_taxes: Deferred tax method per ASC 740. Consolidated filing with parent group; allocated as separate taxpayer. Valuation allowance if more-likely-than-not some DTA not realized.
sub_policies.comprehensive_income: ASC 220; comprehensive income equals net income for all periods presented
sub_policies.depreciation_amortization: Not explicitly disclosed in notes — no material depreciable assets (rights are not amortized; leases use ROU/liability model)
sub_policies.impairment: Not explicitly disclosed — rights tested under indefinite-life intangible framework

notes.title: Cash in trust or otherwise reserved
notes.content: As of 12/31/2024: $13,088 (2023: $43,780) held in separate non-interest-bearing account for amounts from insurers to be remitted to franchisees.

notes.title: Membership's interest
notes.content: No shares/units issued. Sole member: Mondofix USA LLC. Capital contributions receivable from parent: $100,000 as of 12/31/2024, received 3/27/2025. Distributions: $500,000 (2024), $1,400,000 (2023).

with_speedy_novus_glass_llc.note: 2024 amount partially obscured in text extraction

transactions.intercompany_terms: Non-interest bearing, no specific repayment terms for advances; AR/AP repayable on demand
transactions.tax_consolidation: Results included in Mondofix USA LLC consolidated tax return; theoretical taxes charged as intercompany balance

content.fair_value: Carrying values approximate fair values for all instruments due to short-term maturity or terms
content.notable: 91+ day receivables = $304,634 (32.9% of gross AR) — indicates collection challenges with some franchisees

notes.title: Subsequent events
notes.content: Evaluated through March 28, 2025. Capital contribution of $100,000 from parent received 3/27/2025. No other material subsequent events disclosed.

key_findings: Related party expenses are significant: $802K royalties + $552K management fees to ultimate parent = $1.35M (21% of total revenue)
91+ day receivables at $305K (33% of gross AR) suggest collection pressure
Initial franchise fees are deferred and recognized over the license term — the $441K decline in deferred revenue represents recognition of previously collected fees
Rights asset ($300K) carried at cost with indefinite life — no impairment testing methodology disclosed
Vehicle lease accounting is new in 2024 (ROU $226K, liability $226K) — weighted avg term 3.23 years
